description: Suite-level metadata for the Auctor domain pack's regression eval cases. The cases themselves live in the sibling cases.json as a top-level JSON array (one object per case) so the build gate can validate them directly as a list of named, specialist-referencing scenarios. Cases are scenario descriptions for a human or an LLM-judge harness to run against a live or simulated fleet run; they are not executable test code. Unlike Microsite Factory's single-budget suite, this suite exercises TWO separate retry budgets and the pipeline-isolation boundary within one client.
